meaning: adj.(教堂)会众的,[宗]公理教会的
examples: These two historical psalms would have been for congregational use.
One of the least frequent is the congregational form so familiar in the West.
Meanwhile, the structure was detached from the ground to become congregational and waiting Spaces for patients.
Bottom line, despite what Wikipedia says, small churches with a congregational polity should probably avoid corporation sole.
Peter had trained as a Presbyterian minister but took a job preaching at a small Congregational church in Milton, Mass.
